title: Arctic Sea Ice Extent: December 19, 2024
summary: December 19, 2024: (After a short lag in data uploads at NSIDC we have caught up. This report will be for 8 days from Dec 11th); the Arctic sea ice has continued to increase this week at a greater rate of 5.77% (as opposed to last week’s increase rate of 2.62%), from the level on 12/11/2024 of 11.00...

title: IARC Annual Report
summary: Researchers led by IARC’s Go Iwahana take frozen soil samples from the Poker Flat Research Range in Alaska, 2022. Photo by Seth Adams. This is the web version of the International Arctic Research Center 2024 annual report. Message from the Director For 25 years, IARC has furthered our understanding of the Arctic as a system to make a difference. This report is a great reminder of the abundance of talent, expertise and action that IARC researchers, students and staff combine under one roof. It specifically highlights the importance of including diverse thoughts and ideas to gain a holistic view of the Arctic. Igor Polyakov, Andrey Pnyushkov and Laura Whitmore’s research in the Arctic Ocean reveals a trend of accelerated melting sea ice and ocean warming with global connections. The U.S. National Science Foundation and the National Oceanic and Atmospheric Administration have supported this long-term multidisciplinary project, allowing IARC to collaborate with an international team to und...

title: December 2024 Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: December 17 2024 SUMMARY Happy Holidays! As we approach the end of another calendar year, it’s remarkable how quickly time seems to pass. This season offers the perfect opportunity to reflect on our achievements and express gratitude for the dedication and hard work of our Board of Directors, employees, and everyone who contributes to Homer Electric Association’s success. This year has been incredibly busy, filled with challenges and accomplishments, and I deeply appreciate the significant efforts of our Board in making informed decisions that prioritize the best interests of our members. To our employees, thank you for your unwavering commitment to our mission and your contributions, often behind the scenes, to our communities’ well-being. As we look ahead to 2025, we anticipate another year filled with opportunities and meaningful progress for the cooperative. With...
